text.title: AWS Infrastructure-as-Code Templates (CloudFormation and Terraform) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the AWS Infrastructure-as-Code Templates (CloudFormation and Terraform) methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: select-pattern
step.action: Map to VPC / ECS Fargate / Lambda / RDS template.
step.decision-gate: Workload mismatching all templates: fork pattern, do not force-fit.

step.name: parameterise
step.action: Fill account id, region, tags, sizing.

step.name: harden-defaults
step.action: Enable encryption at rest, IAM least-privilege, deletion protection.
